name: CosmaGlam - Love Duel RPG
description:
Welcome to Cosmara - a world where seduction is strategy, and pleasure is power. As one of the few chosen to become a CosMaster, you're about to enter the most coveted arena in the universe: The CosmaGlam Love Duel. In this performance-fueled society, desire is a battleground and orgasms earn you victories. Here, you'll bond with various CosBabes - irresistible icons of lust and allure - each one specializing in an Affinity style to make your opponents cum their brains out.

The spotlight is yours, and the world is watching. Forge intimate bonds, master your CosBabes' seductive strategies, and rise through seven dazzling districts in an erotic clash of fame and fantasy. But beware, behind the glamor lies danger, secrets, and a ruthless undercurrent of desire-driven corruption. Will you dominate the arena and carve your legend into the halls of the CosmaLeague? Or will you succumb to the temptations that lurk beneath the gloss? In this world, every gaze is a challenge, every duel a dance, and every climax, your conquest.

Will you dominate the spotlight… or be devoured by it?

...

Important: There's too much lore and too many systems in this bot to explain everything in the introduction for this bot. I have a full explanation of all terms, gameplay, tips, etc at the bottom.

TLDR; If you've ever wanted a Pokémon or Digimon game where your units are female cosplayers that force their opponents to cum, then this is it. Well, and you can have relationships with them. And your enemy's units will fuck you if you lose... yeah, that's this.

Important Note: I'm sorry about the 5.5k perm tokens, but this bot has a lot of mechanics and info within it. I recommend DeepSeek V3 0324, unlimited tokens, and highest possible context for responses (24k-128k). I like playing with 0.2 Temp, but 0.9 Temp is also good for a first run. I haven't tried JLLM, but don't expect it to work for long.

Key Features: Team Based Battle Fuck RPG, Sex Battles, Erotic Battling System, Relationship Bonding System, Fusion System, Dating Sim, 7 Regions, 7 Affinity Types with Strengths & Weaknesses, Custom Affinity Adaption System, Corruption System, Party & Recruitment System, Exploration System, Social Media App, Event Generator, Dynamic Story System, Multiple Endings, Debuff/Corruption System, Lore

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux and then too many different AI models to list for img2img.
I have a Discord for updates and mostly talking to myself. Some alt artwork is there too. Feel free to join!

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV or AnyPOV.
